FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Predator Incursion
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Dangerous predators have been spotted prowling near the settlement, threatening livestock and workers venturing outside the perimeter.
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.optionDescription: Predators are stalking the settlement's outskirts. Livestock pens are at risk and workers refuse to venture out alone. What do you do?

FactionColonies.FCOptionDef.label: Organize a hunting party. Turn the threat into an opportunity.
Build defensive fences and pens. Keep the predators out.
Pull workers back to the settlement core until the predators move on.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Successful Hunt
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: The hunting party tracked down and slew the predators. Spirits are high, and the pelts and meat are welcome additions to the settlement's stores.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Hunt Gone Wrong
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: The hunting party underestimated the predators. Several workers were injured in the encounter, and the beasts remain at large.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Defenses Erected
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Sturdy fences and reinforced pens now protect the livestock. The predators still lurk in the wilderness, but the settlement is secure.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Workers Sheltered
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Workers huddle within the settlement's core while the predators roam the outskirts. Livestock losses are significant, but no workers were harmed.
